title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
